column1: # STEP 1.  Copy this file and rename the copy to:   legal_exclusions.csv
# STEP 2.  Put it in the  data  folder (next to current/ and previous/).
# STEP 3.  Type the removals in the rows BELOW the line that says
#          "PLACE LEGAL REMOVALS BELOW THIS ROW" -- ONE PER ROW.
#               - a whole issuer name (e.g. Saudi National Bank)
#                 ^ this removes ALL of that issuer's bonds at once
# Notes: lines starting with #  are ignored. You don't have to put ISINs and
# names in separate columns -- just one item per row in the first column.
PLACE LEGAL REMOVALS BELOW THIS ROW
